endpoints.name: Get metadata about the current project
endpoints.description: Returns project data for API key
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /api-specification
endpoints.description: Get API specification metadata
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /api-specification
endpoints.description: Upload an API specification to ReadMe. Or, to use a newer solution see https://docs.readme.com/guides/docs/automatically-sync-api-specification-with-github
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: PUT /api-specification/{id}
endpoints.description: Update an API specification in ReadMe
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api-specification/{id}
endpoints.description: Delete an API specification in ReadMe
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get category
endpoints.description: Returns the category with this slug
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{SLUG}} with a real slug.

endpoints.name: Get docs for category
endpoints.description: Returns the docs and children docs within this category
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{SLUG}} with a real slug.

endpoints.name: Get changelogs

endpoints.name: POST /swagger
endpoints.description: DEPRECATED. Instead use https://docs.readme.com/developers/reference/api-specification#uploadapispecification to upload a Swagger file to ReadMe
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: PUT /swagger/{id}
endpoints.description: DEPRECATED. Instead, use https://docs.readme.com/developers/reference/api-specification#updateapispecification to update a Swagger file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /swagger/{id}
endpoints.description: DEPRECATED. Instead, use https://docs.readme.com/developers/reference/api-specification#deleteapispecification to delete a Swagger file in ReadMe
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get versions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of versions associated with a project API key
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Create version
endpoints.description: Create a new version
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Get version
endpoints.description: Returns the version with this version ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: Update version
endpoints.description: Update an existing version
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.

endpoints.name: Delete version
endpoints.description: Delete a version
endpoints.notes: Replace {{README_USERNAME}} with your README USERNAME. Replace {{README_PASSWORD}} with your README PASSWORD. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid.
